title: Your Name | Work, writing, and conversations
description: A content-driven Astro starter for a clear personal site with selected work, writing, recruiter context, and an optional booking flow.
heroTitle: A calm, clear site for your work, writing, and conversations
heroText: Use this starter to explain who you are, show selected proof, and give people a clear next step. It is designed for personal sites that need to support work, writing, recruiter context, and optional booking in one place.

cards.title: Selected work
cards.text: Show a few representative projects, roles, or outcomes so visitors can understand your contribution quickly.

cards.title: Writing and ideas
cards.text: Publish short essays, reflections, or notes that help people understand how you think and communicate.

cards.title: Recruiter context
cards.text: Create one page that summarises your role fit, working style, and the fastest ways to contact you.

cards.title: Consulting or collaboration
cards.text: Use a dedicated page to explain who you help, how you prefer to work, and what a good fit looks like.

cards.title: Clear next steps
cards.text: Offer direct contact, an optional booking link, or both, without sending people through too many decisions.
